#### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire](index.md 'index')
### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire')

## RepositoryProjectPaths Class

Resolves on\-disk paths to project files within a Hexalith mono\-repo working tree, where the platform
modules \(`Hexalith.EventStore`, `Hexalith.Memories`, …\) are checked out as Git submodules at the
consuming repository root\.

```csharp
public static class RepositoryProjectPaths
```

Inheritance [System\.Object](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.object 'System\.Object') → RepositoryProjectPaths

### Remarks

This is the shared replacement for the per-domain-module `ProjectMetadataPaths` helper that every
domain AppHost previously hand-rolled. A domain module hosts its services on the Hexalith.EventStore
platform by referencing cross-repo project files (added with `IProjectMetadata.SuppressBuild`
set to [true](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/csharp/language-reference/builtin-types/bool 'https://docs\.microsoft\.com/en\-us/dotnet/csharp/language\-reference/builtin\-types/bool')) instead of re-building them, so it needs to resolve those paths relative to
the AppHost's output directory.

The repository root is computed from [System\.AppContext\.BaseDirectory](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.appcontext.basedirectory 'System\.AppContext\.BaseDirectory') assuming the standard
`<repo-root>/src/<Module>.AppHost/bin/<config>/<tfm>/` layout (five levels up).
All Hexalith domain-module AppHosts follow this layout, which makes the resolution identical across modules.
### Methods

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.RepositoryProjectPaths.GetProjectPath(string[])'></a>

## RepositoryProjectPaths\.GetProjectPath\(string\[\]\) Method

Builds an absolute path to a file located under the consuming repository root\.

```csharp
public static string GetProjectPath(params string[] path);
```

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.RepositoryProjectPaths.GetProjectPath(string[]).path'></a>

`path` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')[\[\]](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.array 'System\.Array')

Path segments, relative to the repository root, ending in the target file\.

#### Returns
[System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')
The combined path rooted at the repository root\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.RepositoryProjectPaths.GetRepositoryRoot()'></a>

## RepositoryProjectPaths\.GetRepositoryRoot\(\) Method

Resolves the consuming repository root from the AppHost output directory, assuming the standard
`<repo-root>/src/<Module>.AppHost/bin/<config>/<tfm>/` layout\.

```csharp
public static string GetRepositoryRoot();
```

#### Returns
[System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')
The absolute path to the repository root\.
